name: Earnings Team
description_en: Four-role parallel team that deep-reads an earnings report through the Buffett/Munger/Duan/Li Lu lenses and drafts a WeChat article summarizing the verdict.
description_zh: 四角色并行团队，以巴菲特/芒格/段永平/李录视角精读财报，并起草微信公众号文章总结结论。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It creates a multi-agent team to analyze an earnings release from business, financial, industry, and risk angles, then synthesizes a verdict and a WeChat-ready article.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。创建多 Agent 团队，从生意、财务、行业、风险四个角度分析财报发布，然后综合出结论并生成适合微信公众号发布的文章。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools from tools/, performs web searches, and may produce WeChat article drafts locally. No external accounts required for core analysis.
sec_note_zh: 会运行 tools/ 下的本地 Python 工具、执行网络搜索，并可能在本地生成公众号文章草稿。核心分析无需外部账号。
